zh-TW.title: 安全安裝
steps: 檢查 Windows、管理員、磁碟與 port 8080
驗證 manifest、SHA-256、CER EKU／有效期與 MSI signer
明確同意後才信任自簽憑證
msiexec /norestart 安裝並啟動兩個 services
驗證 ACL、named pipe、SQLite、health 與登入

zh-TW.title: 隔離 PXE
steps: 雙 NIC subnet 不重疊；PXE switch 無其他 DHCP
設定 Web-selected endpoint 並 Prepare runtime
選擇 image、publish profile、執行 preflight
blocking failure 為零後才啟動 ingress
Gen 2 Secure Boot client 到 windows-desktop-ready
停止 DHCP、TFTP、HTTP 並保存 evidence

zh-TW.title: Operation lock
steps: mutation 宣告 resources
OperationCoordinator 依固定順序取得 locks
衝突回傳 409 OPERATION_CONFLICT
Agent 執行 allow-list command
完成、失敗或中止皆釋放 locks
deployment.changed 觸發 REST snapshot 恢復 UI

en.title: Secure installation
steps: Check Windows, elevation, disk and port 8080
Verify manifest, SHA-256, certificate EKU and validity, and MSI signer
Trust a self-signed certificate only after explicit consent
Install with msiexec /norestart and start both services
Verify ACL, named pipe, SQLite, health and sign-in

en.title: Isolated PXE
steps: Keep dual-NIC subnets distinct and remove other DHCP responders
Set the Web-selected endpoint and Prepare runtime
Select an image, publish a profile and run preflight
Start ingress only when blocking failures are zero
Reach windows-desktop-ready on a Gen 2 Secure Boot client
Stop DHCP, TFTP and HTTP and preserve evidence

en.title: Operation lock
steps: A mutation declares its resources
OperationCoordinator acquires locks in fixed order
A conflict returns 409 OPERATION_CONFLICT
The Agent executes an allow-listed command
Completion, failure and abort release every lock
deployment.changed triggers REST snapshot recovery

zh-TW.title: Winception 操作流程 · Setup → Deploy / Monitor → desktop-ready
zh-TW.subtitle: warning 不阻擋；blocking failure、DHCP 安全與 Software Test 隔離不可跳過
steps: 安裝簽章 MSI並登入 loopback Web
設定 root、DPAPI secrets、endpoint、DHCP / boot mode
Prepare runtime、OS image、publish profile
Run preflight
確認 DHCP 安排後啟動 deployment ingress
Client UEFI IPv4 PXE
在 Deploy / Monitor 追蹤 Fleet 與 evidence
windows-desktop-ready；停止 services
zh-TW.retry: 有：依 corrective action 修正並重跑
zh-TW.continue: 沒有：warning 可保留並記錄
zh-TW.softwareTest: Software Test 旁支：同一 lock 內確認 ingress stopped + Fleet empty；完成後還原 checkpoint
zh-TW.offline: Offline ISO 是 additive snapshot；不取代 PXE acceptance

en.title: Winception operator flow · Setup → Deploy / Monitor → desktop-ready
en.subtitle: Warnings do not block; blocking failures, DHCP safety and Software Test isolation cannot be skipped
steps: Install the signed MSI and sign in to loopback Web
Set root, DPAPI secrets, endpoint, DHCP and boot mode
Prepare runtime, OS image and publish profile
Run preflight
Confirm DHCP safety and start deployment ingress
Client UEFI IPv4 PXE
Track Fleet and evidence in Deploy / Monitor
windows-desktop-ready; stop services
en.retry: Yes: follow corrective action and rerun
en.continue: No: warnings may remain and are recorded
en.softwareTest: Software Test branch: under one lock require ingress stopped + Fleet empty; restore checkpoint afterward
en.offline: Offline ISO is an additive snapshot; it does not replace PXE acceptance

Fastify · v1 熟悉 React UI · auth · read model

版本化 schema · allow-list commands

settings · operations · migrations · secret ciphertext

WinPE · profile payload · image cache
zh-TW.data:

Windows 11 clients
WinPE → apply → SetupComplete → desktop-ready
